scripts.debug: npm run grunt-concat && grunt watch & sbt -jvm-debug 9998 run
scripts.start: npm run grunt-concat && grunt watch & sbt -Dconfig.file=/home/conf/application.local.conf -Dsbt.coursier.home='.coursier' -Dsbt.global.base='.sbt' -Dsbt.boot.directory='.sbt/boot' -Dsbt.repository.config='.sbt/repositories' -J-Xmx1536m "~ run"
scripts.start-no-docker: npm run grunt-concat && grunt watch & sbt -Dhttp.port=$SIDEWALK_HTTP_PORT -Dsbt.coursier.home='.coursier' -Dsbt.global.base='.sbt' -Dsbt.boot.directory='.sbt/boot' -Dsbt.repository.config='.sbt/repositories' $SBT_MEM_ARG "~ run"
scripts.play-shell: npm run grunt-concat && grunt watch & sbt -Dconfig.file=/home/conf/application.local.conf -Dsbt.coursier.home='.coursier' -Dsbt.global.base='.sbt' -Dsbt.boot.directory='.sbt/boot' -Dsbt.repository.config='.sbt/repositories' -J-Xmx1536m
scripts.test: echo "No JS tests yet. A Jest suite is being added — see docs/testing-and-ci.md (Phase 1)." && exit 0
